arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim believes Jean-Philippe Mateta will solve two issues for Man Utd
arts.sum: Manchester United are set to be in the market for a new striker this summer and it's understood that Crystal Palace's Jean-Philippe Mateta has admirers at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Liverpool out to avoid unwanted Man United feat in Southampton clash as Mohamed Salah chases Thierry Henry
arts.sum: Liverpool will endeavour to avoid matching an unwanted Premier League feat achieved by Manchester United when they take on Southampton in Saturday's showdown at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Man United 'send scouts to watch next Raphael Varane' in Europa League action - after Jose Mourinho hailed wonderkid for 'saving my a***'
arts.sum: The 19-year-old, who previously spent time in the academy of Fenerbahce's arch-rivals Galatasaray, has similarly been a regular in the Europa League .

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's wife has same Manchester United complaint as Cristiano Ronaldo
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim has endured a tricky few months since taking charge, and fresh reports of further issues have begun to come to the fore

arts.ttl: Barcelona aim to END Man Utd and Arsenal transfer interest for in-demand STAR
arts.sum: If Frenkie chooses not to renew, however, then with just one year left on his contract he would be able to force Barcelona's hand into selling him this summer, where he would surely have his pick of Europe's top clubs. Frenkie de Jong's contract runs out in the summer of 2026, and Ferran Correas has reported in Sport that Barcelona have sent a new renewal offer to the Dutchman.

arts.ttl: Real Sociedad vs Man United: Confirmed Lineups, Team News and Score Prediction
arts.sum: Manchester United face a tough Europa League round-of-16 clash as they face Real Sociedad with this first leg tie kicking off at 17:45. Real Sociedad vs Man United Team News Jon Aramburu and Martin ...

arts.ttl: Kobbie Mainoo new Amazon Prime documentary with exclusive access to Manchester United star
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news as the midfielder is set to feature in a new documentary this month following his journey to representing England at Euro 2024.

arts.ttl: Dan Ashworth is 'lined up for return to the Premier League' three months after being brutally sacked by Man United
arts.sum: Former Man United sporting director Dan Ashworth is reportedly being lined up by a Premier League club, three months after leaving Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Ruben Amorim's side could make 'shock' move for Premier League striker amid Viktor Gyokeres concerns
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly identify a Premier League striker as a possible alternative to top target Viktor Gyokeres of Sporting Lisbon.

arts.ttl: Real Sociedad v Manchester United: Europa League last 16, first leg – live
arts.sum: Europa League updates from 5.45pm GMT kick-off Live scores | Read today’s Football Daily | And mail Scott Manchester United make three changes to the side that started the FA Cup defeat to Fulham. Harry Maguire and Manuel Ugarte are injured, while Christan Eriksen drops to the bench. Patrick Dorgu, Casemiro and Alejandro Garnacho take their places. Hosts Real Sociedad must do without star midfielder Martín Zubimendi, who is ill. But they’re boosted by the return of captain and leading goalscorer Mikel Oyarzabal. Continue reading...
